case_title: LESTER ARNOLD VS. STEPHEN WELLER et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, LESTER SERVED OCT-19-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO X, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT WRITTEN RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, LESTER
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WELLER, STEPHEN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, LESTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLER, STEPHEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 916 ROCKDALE DRIVE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94127, (ONE BEDROOM-WEST SIDE HOUSE, FIRST DOOR ON LEFT AS YOU ENTER THE MAIN HALLWAY-PLUS USE OF COMMON AREAS ON UPPER PART OF HOUSE)**INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WELLER, STEPHEN

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, LESTER SERVED OCT-19-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WELLER, STEPHEN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WELLER, STEPHEN
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, LESTER AS TO DEFENDANT WELLER, STEPHEN DOES 1 TO X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $22.50 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, LESTER
